name: Database Exfiltration Detection
description: Detects and responds to database exfiltration attempts such as bulk data exports, anomalous query patterns, or unauthorized database dumps. Riggs AI analyzes the alert to confirm exfiltration activity, then blocks the offending query session, isolates the database user, and triggers a full investigation with IR lead approval. Generates an executive summary for compliance and legal stakeholders. Designed for advanced SOC analysts and DBAs.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Disable the database user account to prevent further access

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create P1 incident ticket for database exfiltration investigation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify DBA team and SOC of database exfiltration containment

data.title: Database Exfiltration Alert
data.summary: Triggers on bulk export, anomalous query, or unauthorized database dump alerts

data.title: AI Database Exfiltration Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI analyzes query patterns, data volume, and user context for exfiltration indicators

config.custom_instructions: Analyze the database query patterns, exported data volume vs baseline, user role and access history, and destination of exported data. Determine if this is authorized ETL activity or unauthorized exfiltration.

data.title: Exfiltration Confirmed?
data.summary: Branch based on whether database exfiltration is confirmed

data.title: Block Database Session
data.summary: Terminate the active database session executing the exfiltration query

params.reason: Database exfiltration detected — terminating active session

data.title: Disable Database User Account
data.summary: Disable the user account that executed the exfiltration query

params.reason: Database exfiltration — account disabled pending investigation

data.title: IR Lead Approves Investigation
data.summary: Requires IR lead approval before full investigation and executive escalation

data.title: Generate Executive Summary
data.summary: Riggs AI generates executive summary of the database exfiltration incident

config.custom_instructions: Summarize the database exfiltration incident for CISO and legal. Include affected tables, data sensitivity, volume exported, user context, containment actions, and compliance implications.

data.title: Create P1 Incident Ticket
data.summary: Create a P1 Jira ticket with full exfiltration timeline and executive summary

config.title: DATABASE EXFILTRATION — {{$.trigger.alert.database_name}} by {{$.trigger.alert.username}}

data.title: Notify DBA Team & SOC
data.summary: Alert DBA team and SOC channel about containment actions

data.title: Close Alert — Authorized Activity
data.summary: Query activity is authorized ETL or reporting, close alert

config.note: Database query alert reviewed by Riggs AI. Verdict: {{$.nodes.dbe-2.result.verdict}}. Activity determined to be authorized (ETL, scheduled report, or approved export). Closing alert.

config.summary: Database exfiltration detection and response completed
